title: 3 Pieces Teddy Bear Cookie Cutter Set - Bear Face and Teddy Bears - Stainless Steel Biscuit Cutters Fondant Cake Decoration for Baking
features: Fast & Friendly Customer Support: Have questions? We're happy to help! Reach out anytime—we'll respond within 12 hours.
Premium Food-Grade Stainless Steel: Crafted from 0.3mm thick 304 stainless steel, these cutters are BPA-free, rust-resistant, and built to last. Safe, durable, and reusable for years of baking fun.

EASY TO USE & CLEAN: Designed with a folded top edge to protect your hands while pressing, and a smooth cutting edge for clean shapes and easy release. Simply rinse with warm water and dry, or place in the dishwasher for hassle-free cleanup.

USEFUL: Perfect for cutting cookie dough, fondant, butter, soft fruits, bread, sugar, sandwiches, cheese, or craft clay. Ideal for baby showers, first birthdays, or any sweet celebration where you want to add a cute and playful touch.

3-Piece Set – Bear Cookie Cutters: Includes 3 adorable bear-themed shapes with detailed sizes: Bear Face (6.3 × 5 × 2 cm), Teddy Bear (8 × 6 × 2 cm), and Sitting Bear (7 × 6.4 × 2 cm). A sweet and practical set for creating cookies that bring joy to baby-themed parties and everyday baking fun!
